images.prompt: Eames Lounge Chair 670 and Ottoman 671 (1956) three-quarter view → molded rosewood veneer plywood shells with rich black leather cushions on polished cast aluminum five-star swivel base → soft warm 2700K diffused lighting, well-defined natural shadows, warm amber tones → full tonal range from deep shadows to clean highlights → clean minimal background with warm-neutral floor surface → emphasize compound curved shell silhouette, angular three-shell stacking, and sculptural reclining posture → museum-catalog quality, no people, no clutter, no text.

Eames Lounge Chair 670 and Ottoman 671 (1956) in a period-authentic mid-century modern living room → warm wood floors, large windows with natural afternoon light filtered softly, minimal 1950s-1960s California modernist interior → warm 2700-3000K ambient light enhancing rosewood and leather warmth → subtle styling with low furniture and one potted tropical plant → chair and ottoman as natural focal point → full tonal range, rich modeled shadows → no people, historically accurate postwar American interior, no clutter or excessive decoration.
